message:
fix(ufunc): harden overlap detection, broadcasting, and eliminate unwrap panics

Comprehensive robustness pass across UFuncArray operations:

- detect_overlap: full rewrite from zero-stride-only to GCD-based
  stride overlap detection with axis sorting
- isclose/allclose: isclose now supports full broadcasting (was
  size-must-match) with correct NaN/Inf handling
- take_along_axis/put_along_axis: add dimension mismatch validation,
  fix broadcast-source dims to use index 0
- Replace 15+ instances of .unwrap()/.last().unwrap() with safe
  alternatives: direct indexing, .last().copied(), .is_some_and(),
  .total_cmp(), if-let guards, and direct struct construction
- Add 25 linalg bridge tests covering det, inv, solve, cholesky, svd,
  qr, eig, eigh, slogdet, norm, cond, pinv, lstsq, matrix_rank,
  and matrix_power on UFuncArray

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
